results.rendered_html:
saṃśliṣṭa p. p.
1 Clasped or pressed together, joined, united.
2 Embraced.
3 Adjoining, lying close or contiguous to.
4 Furnished or endowed with, having.
5 Related, connected together;  Pt. 2. 127.
